Package battleship.controller

Class BattleshipController

java.lang.Object
battleship.controller.BattleshipController
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBattleshipController
public class BattleshipController extends Object implements IBattleshipController
A controller implementation for a GUI view. This controller creates and uses a BattleshipGame. It implements a state machine to keep track of the state the view should draw next.

    • game

      private final BattleshipGame game

    • view

      private GameState state

  • Constructor Details

    • BattleshipController

      public BattleshipController(IBattleshipView view, String team)
      Creates a new controller object with the given view and team. The images of GameCards loaded here.
      Parameters:
      view - The view object that should be used by the controller. Cannot be changed later.
      team - The team of the game.

  • Method Details

    • nextFrame

      public void nextFrame()
      Calls the draw methods of the view, depending on the current game state. During the game, this method also updates the all changes of cards and game.
      Specified by:
      nextFrame in interface IBattleshipController

    • userInputE

      public void userInputE(int handCIndex, int enemyCIndex)
      When mouse released depending on the handCard and selectedCard called this method. It calls the move method of game for the enemyCards by using enemyCardIndex.
      Specified by:
      userInputE in interface IBattleshipController
      Parameters:
      handCIndex - The index of selected handCard
      enemyCIndex - The index of clicked enemyCard

    • userInputO

      public void userInputO(int handCIndex, int gameCIndex)
      When mouse released depending on the handCard and selectedCard called this method. It calls the move method of game for the own Cards by using gameCardIndex.
      Specified by:
      userInputO in interface IBattleshipController
      Parameters:
      handCIndex - The index of selected handCard
      gameCIndex - The index of clicked own gameCard

    • gameCards

      public ArrayList<Cards> gameCards()
      Returns the gameCardsList of game. It is used to take updated information from Model, but these can not be changed or saved by view.
      Specified by:
      gameCards in interface IBattleshipController
      Returns:
      gameCardsList of game.

    • handCards

      public ArrayList<Cards> handCards()
      Returns the handCardsList of game. It is used to take updated information from Model, but these can not be changed or saved by view.
      Specified by:
      handCards in interface IBattleshipController
      Returns:
      handCardsList of game.

    • enemyCards

      public ArrayList<Cards> enemyCards()
      Returns the enemyCardsList of game. It is used to take updated information from Model, but these can not be changed or saved by view.
      Specified by:
      enemyCards in interface IBattleshipController
      Returns:
      enemyCardsList of game.

    • setEnemyCards

      public void setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards> enemyC)
      When the CardsList of players over network shared, that will be saved by controller in model, and the move will be on enemyCards in this way applied.
      Specified by:
      setEnemyCards in interface IBattleshipController
      Parameters:
      enemyC - List of enemyCards

    • updateSelfCard

      public void updateSelfCard(int index, Cards card)
      If one side plays on card of other side, this will be occurred in model. But the information of ownCard has to be updated. Over network received information with the help of controller will be updated.
      Specified by:
      updateSelfCard in interface IBattleshipController
      Parameters:
      index - index of card, that has to be updated.
      card - the card, that is updated by the model of other side.

    • setState

      public void setState(GameState state)
      Set the game state.
      Specified by:
      setState in interface IBattleshipController
      Parameters:
      state - state of game.

    • getState

      public GameState getState()
      Returns the gameState of game.
      Specified by:
      getState in interface IBattleshipController
      Returns:
      game state.
